zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrix de Rion於1175年1月2日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易格吉時，她的父親Girard de Rion25歲，母親De Macon20歲。她於1190年與Alexandre de Bourgogne在法國利姆辛可斯蒙塔吉耀奧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1221年1月12日在法國利姆辛可斯蒙塔吉耀奧享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安聖 瑪麗 本 慈善事業 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrix de Rion于1175年1月2日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易格吉时，她的父亲Girard de Rion25岁，母亲De Macon20岁。她于1190年与Alexandre de Bourgogne在法国利姆辛可斯蒙塔吉耀奧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1221年1月12日在法国利姆辛可斯蒙塔吉耀奧享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特法維沙安聖 瑪麗 本 慈善事業 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from (Le) Rion, the name of several places in various parts of France.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrix de Rion was born on 2 January 1175, in Gergy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Girard de Rion, was 25 and her mother, De Macon, was 20. She married Alexandre de Bourgogne in 1190, in Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 12 January 1221, in Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrix de Rion est née le 2 janvier 1175, à Gergy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Girard de Rion, avait 25 ans et sa mère, De Macon, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Alexandre de Bourgogne en 1190, à Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 janvier 1221, à Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mary of Charity Church, Faversham,: St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrix de Rion am 2. Januar 1175 in Gergy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Girard de Rion 25 und ihre Mutter De Macon 20. Sie hat 1190 in Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Frankreich Alexandre de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Januar 1221 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Frankreich und wurde in St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Rion è nata il il 2 gennaio 1175 nel Gergy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Girard de Rion, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, De Macon, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Alexandre de Bourgogne nel 1190, nel Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 gennaio 1221, nel Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Rionが1175年1月2日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアージャーグイで生まれた時，父Girard de Rionは25歳，母De Maconは20歳であった。1190年にフランスリモウシンクレウゼモンタグイラウメでAlexandre de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1221年1月12日にフランスリモウシンクレウゼモンタグイラウメで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントファバーシャムスト マリー オフ チャーイトイ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary of Charity Church, Faversham,: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤 스트 메리 프 처이티 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Rion(이)가 1175년 1월 2일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 그르그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Girard de Rion(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 De Macon(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1190년 프랑스 리모우신 크레우스 몽아길로에서 Alexandre de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1221년 1월 12일 프랑스 리모우신 크레우스 몽아길로에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤 스트 메리 프 처이티 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.2 de janeiro de 1175–12 de janeiro de 12: 2 de janeiro de 1175–12 de janeiro de 1221
pt.Saint Mary of Charity Church, Faversham,: St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Rion nasceu em 2 de janeiro de 1175, em Gergy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Girard de Rion, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, De Macon, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexandre de Bourgogne em 1190, em Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1221, em Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary of Charity Church, Faversham,: ст мэри оф чарити чурч, фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrix de Rion родилась 2 января 1175 г. в местности джирги, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Girard de Rion было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали De Macon, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexandre de Bourgogne в 1190 г. в местности монтагуиллаюм, креус, лимусин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 12 января 1221 г. в местности монтагуиллаюм, креус, лимусин, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри оф чарити чурч, фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrix de Rion nació el 2 de enero de 1175, en Gergy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Girard de Rion, tenía 25 años y su mamá, De Macon, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alexandre de Bourgogne en 1190, en Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de enero de 1221, en Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary Of Charity Church, Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
